value: American director, screenwriter and producer born July 16, 1966. Best known for The Exorcism of Emily Rose, Sinister, and Doctor Strange.
American filmmaker Edward Davis Wood Jr. (1924-1978). Widely regarded as one of the worst directors of all time.
American actress who portrayed Nora Combative in 2005. Served as Deputy Director of the Domestic Policy Council.
American literary periodical published 1844-1846 in Philadelphia. Founded by Timothy Shay Arthur.
Woman's magazine started in 1989 by Bauer Media Group in the USA.
